name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Machine Spirit Sanctification, ritual maintenance items, scheduler spine, station pair recovery, doctrine conversations, diegetic diagnostic GUIs, strict command hierarchy, action arbitration, dispatcher-owned acquisition/production/consecration/repair/combat-repair, logistics/construction physical access, persistent portrait assignment, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, expanded priest dossiers, universal known-resource fetch, machine logistics fulfillment, runtime economy governors, movement enforcement, scan-routing, brokered runtime services, Stage 5 movement-failure/proximity repairs, separate Void Priest movement authority, direct-acquisition active-task pulse and recall guard, Ground Route Authority Phase 1 bounded waypoint wrapper, station-area change invalidation, plus 0.1.635 structural GUI frame repair that flattens redundant nested Machine-Spirit and Work-State frames and registers the shared inner.jpg panel sprite for inner menu surfaces.
